text: Watchtower helped us spot Shopify webhook delays impacting order confirmations. Our previous tool was too noisy, but Pulse’s baselines cut alert fatigue dramatically.
TinyETL-based connection got us up and running quickly. We had noise issues before; now incidents are prioritized better and our seller onboarding metrics are finally reliable.
Alert fatigue was a real problem. We needed more granular control and seasonal awareness. Recent Pulse updates improved signal-to-noise and reduced false alarms.
